title: Short title
doc_html:
PART X-A.  PRESCRIPTION MONITORING PROGRAM

§1001.  Short title

This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Prescription Monitoring Program Act".

Acts 2006, No. 676, §1, eff. July 1, 2006.
